sheets.name: Outreach Strategy
data: Outreach Strategy for Automotive Showroom Leads

Use the Kanoo Motors / Chery / Deepal / Xpeng showroom experience as proof that the studio understands automotive retail, brand compliance, premium handover zones, EV education displays, and fast branch rollout needs.
A++ and A+ leads with EV expansion, luxury dealership operations, Chinese brand distribution, or multi-city dealership networks.
Business Development, Dealer Development, Marketing, Projects, Procurement, Facilities, Showroom Expansion, or Corporate Communications.
Position Erwin Ereno as a specialist design-build partner for automotive retail interiors, not as a generic interior contractor.
Mention completed showroom work under Kanoo Motors, including Chery Motors, Deepal, and Xpeng, when relevant to similar Chinese/EV/luxury automotive brands.
Start with a showroom audit, concept refresh proposal, or branch-fitout visualization package before pitching full execution.
Do not chase private contacts. Use official company websites, brand inquiry routes, LinkedIn company pages, and verified corporate channels.
BYD, Chery, MG, GAC, Changan, Jetour, Xpeng-type networks
Fast showroom rollout, EV education areas, modern customer lounges
Send portfolio + compact showroom concept offer
Porsche, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, Land Rover, Genesis
Premium retail experience, VIP lounge, handover suite, lighting and detailing
Toyota, Nissan, Hyundai, Ford, Honda, Kia dealer groups
Branch refresh, signage, customer journey and service reception upgrades
Cebu, Davao, Pampanga, Khobar, Dammam, Jeddah branches
Local branch modernization and brand-standard rollout
